<?php /* * This file is part of the Predis package. * * (c) 2009-2020 Daniele Alessandri * (c) 2021-2025 Till Krüss * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Predis\Command\Redis; use Predis\Command\Command as RedisCommand; use Predis\Command\Traits\Expire\ExpireOptions; /** * @see http://redis.io/commands/expire * * Set a timeout on key. * After the timeout has expired, the key will automatically be deleted. * A key with an associated timeout is often said to be volatile in Redis terminology. */ class EXPIRE extends RedisCommand { use ExpireOptions; /** * {@inheritdoc} */ public function getId() { return 'EXPIRE'; } }
